title: Local AEO: Using Video to Dominate "Near Me" AI Queries
excerpt: AI search relies heavily on local context. Learn how to integrate geographical keywords and local landmarks into your video strategy to dominate local AEO.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
When a user asks Siri or ChatGPT for a local recommendation, the AI pulls from highly-rated, highly-contextual local data.

Localizing Your Video Content

Don't just optimize your Google Business Profile. Create videos that specifically address local concerns, mention local landmarks, and feature local customers. Ensure your video descriptions and transcripts explicitly state your service areas. This hyper-local context proves to Answer Engines that you are the most locally relevant answer.
